title: orchis sambucina f. laurentina
intro: Orchis sambucina f. laurentina, also known as the green helleborine, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orchis sambucina f. laurentina include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe sore throats and skin irritations. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
